title: calathea zebrina
intro: Calathea zebrina, also known as Zebra Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Marantaceae, native to the tropical regions of South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The leaves of the Calathea zebrina plant are said to have health benefits such as reducing stress, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of these uses.
